name: Coconut Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a wide-mouth jar.
2. Seal the jar tightly.
3. Store the mixture at room temperature for 3-4 weeks, turning it every few days to ensure even steeping.
4. Due to the porous nature of the coconut, strain and filter the mixture thoroughly to extract the maximum amount of flavor.
5. Use a natural coconut if desired, but be aware that it may result in a thinner liquid requiring additional coconut solids for consistency.
